case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER,CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR VS. WEI HONG LIU

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER,CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, WEI HONG AN INDIVIDUAL DBA H & B DAY-SPA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER,CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, WEI HONG AN INDIVIDUAL DBA H & B DAY-SPA $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,500.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
